description_long: This object is a large, industrial-style storage locker embedded in a brick or concrete wall, featuring a metallic roll-up door. The door is framed by a robust black metal structure, and two prominent yellow cylindrical bollards are positioned in front to protect the entrance from vehicle impact. The roll-up door has horizontal slats, suggesting it can be raised or lowered for access, and a small lock or control box is visible on the upper left side of the frame. The wall is finished with a light, textured brick or stone pattern, giving the structure a utilitarian yet sturdy appearance. The overall design is typical of storage units or loading docks found in urban or industrial environments, prioritizing security and durability.
description: A robust, wall-embedded storage locker with a metallic roll-up door and two yellow protective bollards in front, set in a light brick wall. The design is industrial and secure, suitable for urban or facility use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metallic roll-up door, black frame, and two yellow bollards against a light brick wall.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the wall, the depth of the door frame, and the cylindrical shape of the bollards.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the wall and the open roll-up door, with the bollards partially visible inside the opening.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the door frame and bollards from the other side.
